title: Morte Cucina
overview: Sao, a talented cook, accidentally meets the man who took advantage of her in the past. She sets her revenge plan in motion using her cooking skill to achieve a rather unexpected result.

title: Minions & Monsters
overview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

title: Enola Holmes 3
overview: Adventure leads detective Enola Holmes to Malta as personal and professional dreams collide on a case more perilous than any she's faced before.

title: In Waves
overview: AJ, a shy teenag­er, meets Kris­ten while in high school in Los Ange­les. Kris­ten is pas­sion­ate about surf­ing… and she’s the most beau­ti­ful per­son he’s ever met. He falls mad­ly in love with her. As life seems to final­ly come togeth­er for AJ, Kristen’s life starts falling apart, shat­tered by ill­ness. Togeth­er, they will fight adver­si­ty with dig­ni­ty and enjoy their now-shared pas­sion for surf­ing and for the ocean, but also their loy­al band of friends… even when they know Kris­ten is doomed. This is what hap­pens when love and friend­ship become a wave stronger than anything.

title: Miss Mermaid
overview: Freshly divorced, Fanny, a thirty-something from Fécamp, has nothing left of her marriage but a sky-blue sofa, debts she refuses to pay, and an absolute determination never to 'start her life' with a man again. Despite her burning need for freedom, this cleaning lady finds herself stuck back at her parents' house.  That is, until the day she crosses paths with Anemone, a professional mermaid passing through the region. She decides to take the plunge and dive into the world of mermaiding.

title: Unification of Japan 75
overview: Kyowakai acting chairman Baba (Akihiko Kuwata) is attacked, and despite Himuro (Yasukaze Motomiya) and Tamura (Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi) rushing to the scene, the assailant escapes. The Keihin Alliance and Marugami-kai suspect Hirakawa (Hitomi Matsuda), who had poor relations with Baba, but based on witness Reiko’s (Reira Arai) description of the attacker, Himuro identifies a likely suspect. Ordering Reiko to stay silent and refusing police involvement, Kyowakai launches its own manhunt. As Baba remains in critical condition and suspicion toward Hirakawa grows among investigators and Kyowakai executives, Himuro quietly burns with thoughts of revenge.

title: Living Corpse
overview: Yosuke Shinkai is haunted by a past he cannot recall - and a body that is rapidly decomposing. He is a living corpse, unclear who he is or why he has been brought back to life only to suffer again a slow gruesome death. Based on the 1986 horror manga by Hideshi Hino.

title: RUNTME
overview: Cybersecurity lead Jordan Miller discovered something at work that he can't ignore, armed with a stolen USB drive, can he put things right before it's too late?

title: Forks
overview: A group of gangsters who notoriously kill with forks struggle in the aftermath of a failed illegal deal.

title: Para atrapar el viento
overview: A man chases a rebellious gust of wind across the hills as it creates chaos and music through the grassland.

title: 'Mr. Paradise'
overview: Rejected by the person he changed for, Tyler Terry, a picture-perfect boy must become who he truly is after losing himself to being someone else's paradise.

title: Life Coach
overview: A lonely Muay Thai instructor (Mark Bale) seeks self-confidence through an online life-coaching app, gradually surrendering control to an unseen mentor.

title: Naxos
overview: On a research trip to Greece, Adam slips into a parallel life without marriage, children, or responsibility. With Nysa, a local, he drifts through enchanted freedom while haunted by the life he once took for granted.

title: The Social Distance
overview: In an attempt to make the most of their limited fun during the summer of the  Covid-19 lockdown, a science nerd and her boy-crazy best friend decide to build  a spaceship to escape the quarantine before the summer ends and they start at  different highschools, but as the lift-off draws near, they find that building a  rocket may prove easier than maintaining their friendship.

title: Burisch
overview: Dan Burisch recalls his time at Area 51.

title: No Volveré
overview: A lonely ventriloquist is served divorce papers at the showroom bar where he works. Things take a strange turn when he tries to remedy the situation with his puppet, Luis.

title: Polymer
overview: A cuck smokes a cigarette backwards while a failed rapper reminisces on his downfall. They come to realize a startling existential truth.

title: Grizzly Night
overview: On August 12, 1967, in Montana's Glacier National Park, the unthinkable happened: that same night, nine miles apart, there were not one—but two—fatal grizzly bear attacks.

title: The Bay
overview: Best friends Emma and Lani, attending a destination wedding in Thailand, find themselves trapped on a sinking tour boat in the heart of a tiger shark sanctuary.

title: The Birthday Trip
overview: An unflinchingly funny satire following three millennial couples whose relationships are thrown into disarray when they descend on a luxury Southern Highlands farmstay for a birthday weekend they'll never forget.

title: Jackie the Stripper
overview: A female empowerment grind house comedy action thriller. Jackie and her band of female vigilante assassins hatch a plan to kill six members of the evil male dominated court. With deadly and hilarious consequences

title: Dua Nafas
overview: Anto was entrusted to his grandmother in the village, grew up to become a successful doctor, and then returned to make her proud—only to find that his grandmother had died while waiting for him.

title: Overman: O Filme
overview: An unemployed hero on the verge of an emotional and financial collapse, searches with all his strength for a purpose in life. When he receives an offer to work at the Public Security Secretariat, he feels relieved and thinks that he will finally be able to put his life back together, but the hero quickly discovers that the job is far from what he expected.

title: About the Dream to Be Unsinkable
overview: The film traces the rise  and fall of GDR deep-sea fishing fleet - and the afterlives of its last surviving ships. Once more than a hundred strong, only a few vessels remain, now under new names, with new missions and new dreams: repurposed as rescue boats, cultural platforms, or sound spaces.

title: Para los jóvenes: a 20 años del 2006
Die Töchter Europas
overview: A road movie set in long-distance coaches, on motorways and in bus terminals across a supposedly borderless Europe. A cinema documentary in kaleidoscopic snapshots tracing the fates of three very different women, their experiences and encounters.

title: Revelations
overview: Nuca, one of the world’s leading bee specialists, celebrates her birthday surrounded by family traditions. As the family matriarch, time is relentless in its toll on her memory loss. In an attempt to remember, she revisits family photographs, and as the past and present intertwine, secrets begin to surface. At this celebration, it won't just be the photos that are revealed.

title: The Death of Robin Hood
overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

title: 7G Rainbow Colony 2
overview: Nearly 10 years post the tragic death of Anitha, Kathir's ailing mother makes desperate attempts to get him settled after sensing his attraction to the daughter of Flat No.7G's Newest Tenant.

title: De Gaulle: The Sovereign Edge (Film 2)
overview: Part two of a two-part biopic following French army officer Charles De Gaulle's life and political commitment between 1940 and 1945, and trace his development towards a political career.

title: The Street Photographer
overview: Matthijs is a street photographer in Amsterdam, aiming to succeed and grow within his profession. A new client gives him a unique photography assignment: create a photo that captures the spirit of art in Amsterdam.  Matthijs travels the city in search of the best photo, ultimately learning not only what he considers the essence of true art, but also how he can become a better artist himself.

title: Kuchi ni Kansuru Ankēto
overview: Feature-length adaptation of Sesuji's "Kuchi ni Kansuru Ankēto".

title: THE ORIGIN OF ULTRAMAN
overview: The landmark Japanese Tokusatsu TV series Ultraman became a massive social phenomenon upon its debut in 1966, reaching a staggering peak viewership rating of 42.8%. Six decades later, Tsuburaya Productions continues to introduce new entries into the Ultraman series, expanding its unique universe to a global audience across generations. This documentary brings together leading voices from the fields of cinema, Tokusatsu, and design. Witness profound testimonies from an international assembly of creators, including: Guillermo del Toro, Hirokazu Kore-eda, Hideo Kojima, Hideaki Anno, Shinji Higuchi, and Nicolas Winding Refn.

title: Capybara
overview: Full animated capybara movie. Plot TBA

title: Mary Oliver: Saved by the Beauty of the World
overview: From a lonely childhood to literary fame, her life was shaped by devotion to nature, paying attention, and the long journey toward learning to love and to be loved.  If poetry had a pop icon, Mary Oliver would be it.

title: Why Wait, Just Die
overview: Asami Kashima was killed by someone. Eiko Watarai visits Asami's boss, Yamazaki, asking him to tell about her…

title: Le Temps d'une Tartine 2
overview: While Mixel tries the best he can to help along with Martin's parents, Charlène and Martin have escaped the flames and appeared somewhen else, where twists and turns won't end. Why is everything happening? To find that out... they must go Back to the Toaster!

title: JE VEUX FAIRE UN FILM ABSTRAIT !
Action Stage: Helios Rising Heroes -New Dawn-
overview: Four years have passed since the "Lost Zero" incident.  Keith Max still believes in the survival of Dino Albani, who was presumed dead, and continues to pursue him.  Meanwhile, Brad Beams keeps a close eye on Keith's precarious actions, striving to find answers to his own doubts.  At this time, a new "Eclipse" threat creeps into the city.  In the midst of this chaotic situation, standing before the "Heroes" is "Zero," with whom they have fought countless times.  As they confront each other once again, the lost time begins to move violently once more.

title: The Gang
overview: Ayman, a teenager of Moroccan descent, is invited by Sara to a party at the same house where his mother works as a domestic worker. Along with Eric and Robert, his lifelong friends, they set off on a journey filled with confrontations and disappointments -with society and with themselves- putting their gang's friendship to the test. Once at the party, they discover that life isn't what they thought, and that wanting something doesn't always make it possible.

title: Ananya's Call
overview: Faced with an impossible encounter in her own home, a young woman must race against time to stop a tragedy that defies the laws of nature.

title: How They Really Are
overview: A boy named Tyler Ortin is struggling with lonlieness and the problem of his parents constant fighting when he becomes friends with a classmate Louey. Tyler helps his class get their grades back on track but the stress catches up to him.

title: SOMEWHERE OVER THE RAINBOW
overview: A surreal odyssey follows a 16 year old throught music

title: Anfa 8
overview: In the city of Soli, ruled by Anfa 8, where night is eternal, Horus hunts a renegade cult of solar worshippers who are desperately searching for the sun.

title: Eve
overview: While visiting her father's apartment, a woman discovers that the man who raised her might be something less than human.

title: Anna by the Window
overview: A filmic portrait of 24 hours in the life of an aimless teen boy as he avoids his overbearing artist father and AI startup founder brother.

title: Inevitably Alone
overview: When a grieving father is diagnosed with terminal cancer, his desperate attempts to reconnect with his estranged sons force them all to confront the weight of loss, love, and the inevitability of being left behind.

title: Joust
overview: A day at the Renaissance Festival.

title: Andrea Gibson: Love Letter from the Afterlife
overview: Andrea Gibson's final performance brought to film

title: Night Comes
overview: Against the backdrop of a cataclysmic event that threatens to engulf humanity, two sisters manage to escape the horror only to find themselves thrust into a perilous struggle for survival, tasked with a mission that holds the fate of mankind in the balance.

title: The Grandmaster's Gift
overview: Set in early 2000s Taiwan, The Grandmaster's Gift explores political divisions through the unlikely friendship between a former Nationalist soldier who masters Chinese chess and a boy from a single-parent family whose taxi driver father supports Taiwanese independence.

title: EXAMSTRESS
overview: Examstress is a short student film created for college, year 2/2. This film is about the stress of exams and typical student mental health during this time. It follows Penn, a procrastinating student, as they work towards their final major project.

title: Red Anorak
overview: A film director has a mysterious relationship with a figure wearing a memorable red anorak.

title: PAN DE AJO
overview: Victor, a shy and anxious guy, goes to Gabriel's apartment for the money he owes him. When he opens the door to Gabriel's room he will find nothing but horror...

title: Do Stars Know Fear?
overview: Trapped operative confronts cunning foil amid tense, futuristic space hemisphere.

title: Moana
overview: Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

title: François.e
overview: François, a 50-year-old screenwriter whose career is on the decline, cynically ticks the "transgender" box to secure funding for his latest TV series project. When, against all odds, his plan works and his project is accepted, he finds himself having to portray… Françoise, an author beginning her transition. Unable to fulfill the required role, he must team up with Sarah, a real trans writer. As Françoise, François finally achieves success. He fills his bank account and reconnects with his teenage daughter… but as his deception continues, the price to pay proves higher than expected: his truest bonds are forged around his new identity. Françoise liberates him as much as she imprisons him.

title: L'écologie des sentiments
overview: Lola, a young animal rights activist, mysteriously travels to Paris during the Salon de l'Agriculture. As she settles into her hotel room, where nothing works, she calls on the room boy, Felix, a whimsical young man who is having a panic attack on his bed.

title: What Am I Looking At? Is It Someone’s Navel?
overview: While attempting to record life as it was, Arthur unintentionally documents his family’s unraveling.

title: Night in the Valley of Witches
overview: This film is set in the Valley of the Witches area within Ghibli Park and is the first original animated short film created by Studio Ghibli specifically for the park.

title: I Am The Bride
overview: On The Death's Curve there's a legend: at 3:00 a.m. a bride dressed in white appears, waiting for her next victim. A detective teams up with a priest, a paranormal investigator, and a medium, to bring an end to this puzzle.

title: Home Stories
overview: As a contestant in a singing casting show, Lea is asked by the TV team who she is and what makes her special. She doesn't know and begins to slip into different roles in her search for what makes her special, developing an unexpected fascination for her aunt Kati. Kati's return home as head architect for the renovation of the Residenzschloss after many years abroad reunites the family in one place. This reunion raises the hopes of grandparents Friedrich and Christel that they can join forces to give their pension, which has few visitors, a new lease of life.

title: Unidentified Murder
overview: When an influencer couple's prank turns deadly, blackmail, aliens, and links to a 25-year-old missing child case emerge, plunging them all into a web of mystery.

title: Трасса «Море — море»
overview: A red convertible is speeding from St. Petersburg to Sochi, driven by the brazen photographer Tyoma. With him are his ex-wife, Sasha, and her new fiancé. Tyoma will do anything to prevent Sasha's new wedding. And the fatal hitchhiker Kira, rescued by the guys, will help him. Tyoma has only one way across the country to change and win back the love of his life—if his brakes don't fail.

title: Unanswered//butterfly
overview: The world’s first full-dive VRMMO, Sword Art Online—known as SAO. What was meant to be a dream come true has instead transformed into a deadly game where dying in the virtual world means dying in reality. Emirun and Rex, who once knew each other in the real world, reunite by chance within SAO. They join a scouting party to learn how to survive in this unforgiving world. One day, however, they encounter a mysterious PK known only as the Black Swordsman. When Emirun rushes to the scene, she finds Rex collapsed in despair, and the Black Swordsman standing over him. The one who wiped out their entire scouting party... was the Black Swordsman! Determined to avenge their fallen comrades, Emirun and Rex seek out the legendary prodigy swordswoman Asuna, and begin intense training under her guidance. In a death game where even players turn against one another, what new beginning will these two reach at the end of their struggle…?

title: 402 Rumah Sakit Angker Korea
overview: A group of Indonesians: Juna, Adit, Bara, Arum, Yuri, and Tyas set out to live-stream a test of courage at the so-called most haunted hospital in South Korea, Yong-Won Hospital. Rumor has it that the hospital was once a front for a cult whose members chose to die following their leader. Now, the hospital is in a state of disrepair and no one dares to enter. This motivates Juna and his friends to become the first people to live-stream there.

title: Alpha
overview: Two fierce female agents tackle dangerous missions in a thrilling world of espionage, as they navigate perilous situations, execute daring stunts, and face unexpected turns in this action-packed adventure.

title: Gail Daughtry and the Celebrity Sex Pass
overview: A Midwestern bride-to-be, Gail Daughtry, has a celebrity hall pass agreement with her fiancé… who uses it. Their relationship in crisis, Gail sets out on an epic journey through Hollywood to even the scales.

title: Mrigaya 1.5: The Hunt Continues
overview: Officer-in-Charge Debanjan Dutta of the Kolkata Police and his team face mounting danger while investigating a gruesome crime that shakes their neighborhood. As twists derail the probe, a ruthless gang spreads chaos across the city. With tensions rising and violence erupting, the hunt intensifies.

title: The Misadventures of Girth Brooks
overview: Prequel short film to “BUM” (2025)

title: The convent
overview: Lucía and Ana Ma, two young postulants recently arrived at a small convent, find themselves involved in the strange events that occur there.

title: Barrio Triste
overview: On the outskirts of Medellín, Colombia in the late 1980s, local residents report strange lights descending from the sky. When a reporter arrives to investigate, a ragtag group of teens from a lawless neighbourhood storm the scene and steal his camera. In the hands of its new owners, the device records a mesmerising plunge into their frantic existence.

title: Remake
overview: The death of his son causes McElwee, an autobiographical filmmaker, to look back on his life’s work. He eventually turns to his archive of home movies. To what extent did his camera affect their relationship when Adrian was alive? To what extent does it define that relationship now that he is gone? Meanwhile, an effort to adapt McElwee’s first feature, Sherman’s March, into a work of fiction lurches along, giving the filmmaker another perspective from which to meditate on movie making and mortality.

title: TROPHY
overview: The story follows So-hee, a 14-year-old Zainichi Korean girl. She goes to a Korean school and devotes herself to Korean traditional dance as her school club activities. One day, at an exchange event with a Japanese school, she befriends Mirai, a Japanese girl who shares her love of K-pop. Through this encounter, So-hee gradually begins to connect with the world beyond her own. As their friendship deepens, the two decide to sell unused items from So-hee's home on a flea market app to earn money for their favorite K-pop idols live tickets. One item fetches an unexpectedly high price-a North Korean CD, which is So-hee's father's. Sanju, the father, is the principal of a Korean elementary school. Emboldened by this success, So-hee and Mirai take it a step further, eventually selling even the medal that Sanju had been awarded by his homeland, North Korea.

title: SHIBOYUGI: Playing Death Games to Put Food on the Table - 44: CLOUDY BEACH
Trigger
overview: A disillusioned ex-soldier, Wyatt Kane, retreats into the woods, only to class with a team of State Police protecting a corrupt logging company. As tensions rise, Kane uncovers a conspiracy that forces him to fight for justice- no matter the cost.

title: Life Support
overview: Since October 2023, Gaza has been sealed from the world-except for one group. International doctors breach the blockade, what they find is not just a humanitarian crisis, but a calculated dismantling of life itself.

title: All the Queens Houses
overview: A photographic exploration of Queens’ unconventional architecture reveals the borough’s beauty through the eyes of an architect while uncovering the deeper history behind its strange and spectacular designs.

title: Rabbit on a Highway
overview: A neurotic, alcoholic trans man struggles through navigating his social and love life.

title: Winter Lights
overview: Experimental short movie shot during Christmas and New Year's Eve.

title: No Sun on Salvation
overview: In 1897, Penelope comes to terms with the death of her father with the help of Alabama, a hermit whose daughter is dying from the same illness.

title: Mala
overview: Reema inherits an abandoned resort on a remote island, and with her three friends, sets out to uncover the truth behind her inheritance. She soon discovers strange locals, cryptic messages from her late mother, and a familial curse involving tantric rituals and black magic. As tensions rise, Reema and her friends must confront their deepest fears to survive the island’s sinister grip.

title: Lads Being Lads
overview: The series follows four close friends who live in the all too depressing yet fictional village of Greyville, Ireland. The kind of place you would expect barely anything to happen. But for Eoin McGintley, Patrick Quinn, James Dames, and Marky Mac, the four of whom are just trying to find some adventure and a few laughs, it becomes the epicentre for their many outright whacky and foolish shenanigans as the lads try to just have fun with what little youth they have left now that adulthood lies closer around the corner for this group of immature teens.

title: Long Live Bernie
overview: After a hacker gains Bernie's personal interests on the internet, he demands £2,000 from Bernie during his venture back to his home town.

title: LOVESTRUCK
overview: During a date night between Audrey (Jordan Baker) and Henry (Benjamin Sears) a crazed ex of Audrey’s breaks in to pursue Audrey, killing anyone who gets in his way.

title: Acropolis Cats and Other Wondrous Creatures
overview: Exploring the lives of stray cats in Athens and beyond, ACROPOLIS CATS AND OTHER WONDROUS CREATURES examines the tenderness and tragedies in human-animal relationships. It reflects on love, cruelty, compassion, and what we can learn about freedom in a rapidly changing world.

title: NJPW G1 Climax 36 - Day 1
overview: The first night of G1 Climax 36 took place on July 11, 2026, at the NOW Arena in Hoffman Estates, Illinois, marking the first time New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW)’s annual round-robin heavyweight tournament opened in the United States since 2019.

title: A Kindness
overview: After fleeing a blood-soaked nightmare in the woods, a priest seeks shelter in the home of a kind suburban woman.

title: Hitch
overview: A woman encounters a hitchhiker in the middle of the night while driving. From there, things spiral into absurdity, blurring the lines between what's real -and what isn't.

title: Fallen From Olympus
overview: Following the Trojan War, a soldier facing death encounters Thanatos and is drawn into a mythological confrontation about life, fate, and the meaninglessness of war.

title: The Wicked Die Young
overview: A young prince embarks on a surreal odyssey across a dangerous landscape filled with mafia gangsters, yakuza vampires, and supernatural witches. Along the way, he is joined by a living wishing star, who has secret motives of her own. Together, they journey towards a Sorceress’s den for revenge.

title: House Party
overview: 3 friends arrive at another friend's house to watch a movie, but things quickly go wrong.

title: A casa que levo no peito
Better Days
overview: Feature film directed by Hamza Pool, currently in post-production, style and plot kept under wraps.

title: The Dreamed Adventure
overview: The story of a woman living in the border region between Bulgaria, Greece and Turkey, who agrees to partake in a special deal in order to help a friend. However, this will lead her into a dangerous situation, and she will have to confront her desires

title: The Last Woman on Earth
overview: Gu Hana is a blunt blue-haired woman taking a liberal film art class. No one gives her sincere feedback on her screenplay, which is full of anger toward men. But only one person, Song Cheol, an aspiring director who wishes to make a feature film, approaches her and says, “Hey, isn’t this screenplay hatred of men?” He believes a sponsored enterprise didn’t select his screenplay because it didn’t receive the ‘extra points from woman’s film.’ He ridiculously suggests that Hana team up with him…!

title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland
overview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain - Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work with Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.

title: Televil
overview: Glah discovers an old TV in the storage room of his house. On the screen, 90s TV shows are being broadcast featuring four teens who went missing 35 years ago, crying out for help.

title: As Dez Vantagens de Morrer Depois de Você
Lastri Arwah Kembang Desa
overview: Based on an urban legend from Pati, Central Java, about a woman known as the "kembang desa" and a dark story that continues to live in folklore.

title: Quando Tudo Joga Contra
overview: On the verge of failing literature, a high school soccer defender begins tutoring sessions with the quiet boy in his class—unaware that their connection will turn into something more.

title: 125, rue des Malaises
overview: Before leaving, Laurent Perrier wants to settle his affairs and ensure nothing is left unresolved.

title: Wasteman
overview: Taylor's hopes for a fresh start post-parole are jeopardised by cellmate Dee's arrival. As Dee takes Taylor under his wing, a vicious attack tests their bond, forcing Taylor to choose between protecting Dee and his own chances at freedom.

title: The Odyssey
overview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.

title: Evil Dead Burn
overview: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

title: The Last Sunrise
overview: A young American woman with health challenges finds unexpected romance with a charismatic local during her summer in Majorca, forcing her to weigh her heart's desires against family obligations and her planned return home.

title: Heartstopper Forever
overview: Nick and Charlie are inseparable, but with Nick preparing to leave for university and Charlie finding new independence at school, the reality of a long-distance relationship begins to weigh on them. Doubts take hold, and their relationship faces its biggest challenge yet. Meanwhile, their friends are also navigating the ups and downs of love and friendship, confronting the bittersweet challenges of growing up and moving on.

title: Dhamaal 4
overview: Fourth instalment in the Dhamaal franchise.

title: AnyMart
overview: A supermarket as both a microcosm of Japanese society and the setting for a socially critical horror film. Expressionless faces and a supervisor who demands zombie-like friendliness. Only the young Sakai doesn’t stop hoping.

title: Dastaar
overview: Directed by Amar Hundal

title: You, Fireworks, and Our Promise
overview: The coming-of-age romance is set during the Nagaoka Festival Grand Fireworks Show, one of Japan's three major fireworks shows that draws several hundred thousand visitors to Niigata Prefecture every year. What connects Makoto (a Tokyo high school boy without social skills or self-confidence) and Aki (a popular high school girl and class president with beauty and talent) is a drawing of a fireworks display. At the mercy of the drawing's mystery and fate itself, the two have to make a choice in a limited amount of time.

title: Black Box (Flight 298)
overview: The supernatural events surrounding Vero Airlines Flight 298 from New Orleans to Seattle.

title: Watchful Eyes
overview: Sebastian, a grieving man, takes a janitor job on a university campus. While monitoring students linked to a professor’s death, he uncovers a ghost story that may be more real than anyone believed.

title: In the Company of Wolves: An American Journey
overview: Follows the journey of wolves and other animals as co-travelers through American history.

title: The Dendrill
overview: While preparing their childhood home for sale, Mark reunites with his estranged stepbrother, Francis, who insists the forest never forgot them.

title: 28 Hours Later
overview: 28 hours after the Rage virus began to spread a group of young people begin to travel to a new safe space

title: Motel Inn
overview: Daniel has worked at a motel for years. He has seen a range of strange guests enter and leave; these four have been the strangest.

title: Operation Kino
overview: A trio of thieves infiltrate a movie theater to obtain an object

title: Silent Verses
overview: A stuttering young boy, pressured by his father, finds solace in his bicycle—until a troubled boy steals it, leading to an unlikely friendship.

title: I Don't Know What I'm Doing Here
overview: Mima, an American college student, embarks on a road trip to the rural Romanian village where her grandmother, Esther, was born. Her friend Jacob, a recent film-school dropout, joins her in the old country, along with an 18-year-old translator whom she found on Facebook. Decades after Esther’s death, Mima relies on her grandmother’s unmarked photos of the village and recorded oral history to orient herself in the remote area. As the trio scale walls and trek through fields searching for any evidence of Esther’s life in Romania, the deeper unknowns animating Mima's journey begin to reveal themselves.

title: The Killer's Game: Marai Mugam
overview: After the assassination of a powerful crime syndicate heir, a coastal township is thrown into chaos. Inspector Anand Kumar is assigned to investigate the sudden rise in violence, only to uncover a trail leading to a mysterious vigilante known as the Sweet Rogue Killer. As the ruthless Forelli syndicate returns to reclaim control, hidden truths from the past begin to surface. Caught between law and justice, Anand must navigate a dangerous path as the vigilante steps out of the shadows, leading to a confrontation that will determine the fate of the town.

title: Hallway Monitor
overview: George's sister is sick. Trying his best to take care of her, the twelve year old boy spends all hospital visits inspecting the hallway for anything that might put her in danger. When his routine inspection is interrupted, George must face the danger all around him.

title: Doglady
overview: Through interaction within the objects in her bag, a half-human, half-dog being known as the Doglady begins to understand each facet of her existence and being.

title: Comédie-Française
overview: At the Comédie-Française, there is one golden rule: the play is never canceled. Unfortunately for Nina, everything else is—just three hours before the premiere of her first staging. An actor is stuck on a train, tensions explode, equipment breaks down, egos clash, and panic sets in. With no way out and time slipping away, Nina must hold the show together at all costs. Will she make it until the curtain rises?

title: The Girl in the Clouds
overview: The adventures of a young girl named Providence, who is entrusted with a magic quill that makes everything she writes come true. Faced with this incredible power, she has to choose between living her dreams and saving the world.

title: The Disconnection
overview: Luke is pressured by a pair of stereotypical bullies to get a new phone, so he enlists the help of his unpredictable, dumb friend Liam, but their mission quickly spirals into chaos when a pair of rich, phone-obsessed twins enter the classroom, turning a simple task into a ridiculous, absurd adventure.

title: Pacific
overview: A group of young travelers are stranded on an island in the Pacific where they struggle to escape an evil presence kept hidden from mankind for centuries.

title: Vishwanath & Sons
overview: Sanjay Vishwanath is an acclaimed professional handgunner in his 40s with a major stake in fame and wealth. When he comes across a woman named Maddy in her 20s, their dynamic poses many issues that they must come to terms with.

title: Hasta el fin del mundo
overview: Manuel's life is upended when Esmeralda, his lost love from 15 years ago, calls unexpectedly. Despite being set to marry another, he rediscovers Esmeralda, and they realize their love transcends time.

title: I Rarely Wake Up Dreaming
overview: Olha and Oleh live in Ukraine as LGBTQ+ individuals. However, Russia's war of aggression is putting the couple's identity and love to the test.

title: Noga
overview: Fearless alternative pop singer Noga Erez is on the brink of superstardom with a unique, captivating sound and a major studio album on the way. But when war erupts and cracks appear in her relationship, Noga must redefine her role as an artist on a global stage.

title: "It's Murder!"
overview: Officer Wray is determined to prove to his boss that he has what it takes to bring justice for an innocent victim involved in a murder case gone wrong. His boss assigns him onto a recent murder case involving 7 suspects who all had the potential to have committed this murder. As Officer Wray digs deeper into this mystery, with the help of a key witness and a helpful journalist, the situation becomes more and more dangerous for not just himself, but for everyone involved...

title: Butterfly Effect: Azzam
overview: Azzam a 12-year-old boy is suddenly transported to an isolated world of butterflies during a family trip to the south of Saudi Arabia. Transformed into a butterfly, he must find himself to find his way back to the real world and his family.

title: To my sisters
overview: Four women are on an existential journey in Morocco, connecting with local women from all walks of life bonding in sisterhood, and share their common quest for empowerment.

title: The American Dream
overview: No one would have bet on Jérémy, stuck behind the counter of a video store, or on Bouna, who cleans airports. With no money, no connections, and painfully poor English, who could have predicted they’d one day become big-name agents in the NBA? What they lack in experience, they will make up for in audacity, while remaining true to their one credo, doing business with a human touch. Scouting raw talent while improvising their way up, they’ll fake it until they make it – chasing their American Dream and landing multi-million-dollar deals.

title: Saccharine
overview: After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she's eating.

title: Her Private Hell
overview: Against the backdrop of a futuristic, neon-soaked metropolis, a troubled young woman embarks on a high-stakes search for her missing father. As a mysterious mist descends upon the city and unleashes a lethal presence, her path intersects with an American soldier on a desperate mission of his own.

title: Motor City
overview: In 1970s Detroit, John Miller falls in love with the girlfriend of a local gangster. To get revenge, the gangster sets up a frame-up to send the innocent man to prison. With his life ruined, Miller plots revenge against the man who took his girlfriend away from him.

title: 72 Hours
overview: After he's inadvertently added to their group text, a forty-year-old executive hopes to save his flailing career by joining a group of twenty-somethings on a wild three-day bachelor party.

title: The Dink
overview: Desperate to save a struggling country club and earn his father's respect, a washed-up tennis pro is compelled to break a sacred vow and do the unthinkable: play pickleball.

title: Want to Play with Someone?
overview: A group of unsuspecting individuals becomes entangled in a series of chilling supernatural occurrences after stumbling upon a long-forgotten urban legend. As the boundary between the living and the dead blurs, they are forced to participate in a deadly "game" with a mysterious entity, where losing means a fate far worse than death.

title: Untitled Kamen Rider ZEZTZ Summer Movie
overview: The untitled Kamen Rider ZEZTZ summer movie that will air as double feature with the Super Space Sheriff Gavan Infinity summer movie. Plot TBA.

title: Chiikawa the Movie: The Secret of the Mermaid Island
overview: Feature-length Story based on the "Siren Arc" from Nagano's popular Manga.

title: Untitled Super Space Sheriff Gavan Infinity Summer Movie
overview: The untitled Super Space Sheriff Gavan Infinity summer movie that will air as double feature with the Kamen Rider ZEZTZ summer movie. Plot TBA.

title: Don Quijote in Barcelona
overview: Lluc, a former academic with strong cultural ties, and Olli, a man who drifted from Finland to the streets of Barcelona, meet while seeking shelter in the same stairwell. Their beginnings are modest, but gradually a connection develops between them, based not on pity but on shared humanity.

title: Ishqnama
overview: ‘ISHQNAMA’ True Story of True Lovers NIMMA–NASIMA

title: la fille aux talons d'argile
overview: Essay film based on the homonymous book  by Juliet Berto.

title: The Actor
overview: A young actor attempts to finish their self audition tape. But a series of never ending interruptions sends him into an existential spiral.

title: Return to My Blue
overview: A documentary about some disabled children go on a trip to a deserted island in Okinawa.

title: A Palette for Murder
overview: Six seeming unrelated men receive mysterious invitations to a lavish dinner at the mansion of the enigmatic Count Reginald Black. As they gather in the opulent, eerie residence, they find themselves wrapped in a web of intrigue, each hiding secrets, motives, and personal stakes that could be their undoing.

title: The Taro Donatella Story
overview: From Underdog to legend - From silence to legend. The Taro Donatella Story is the true rise of a man who built an empire alone. A journey of ambition, obsession, and belief in the impossible. - "Mark Zuckerberg & Taro Donatella. One code. One invention. Who actually created the real-time algorithm? The truth behind the biggest lie in social media history - Coming Summer 2026."

title: Chainsaw Man: The Stage - Reze Arc
overview: The hugely popular manga "Chainsaw Man" by Tatsuki Fujimoto is being adapted into a stage play! The highly anticipated second installment "Reze Arc."

title: Apology
overview: Three friends find themselves in an unprecedented search for an unknown man around their hometown.

title: Replika
overview: After surviving a horrific car crash and losing his arm, an unstable family man develops a bizarre fascination for augmenting his body with bionic prosthetics.

title: RISE
overview: The year is 2099. With the evolution of AI bringing machines to a superior to human intelligence they have lived peacefully and in harmony together. Until now…

title: The Ultimate Linemarker
overview: We follow Borus, a road line marker who treats asphalt like a sacred canvas, as he passionately explains the emotional and deep importance of straight lines, proper spacing, and precision. His manager and a rival crew who see the job as “just paint” are brought into the world of Borus, who always has a new way of sharing his passion of the job. His world is thrown into chaos when a reckless young teammate commits the ultimate workplace sin: unauthorized road doodling. As Borus spirals over compromised line integrity, In the ultimate irony, he is “punished” with the assignment of his dreams — the very stretch of road he’s been dreaming about for years. For Borus, it’s not discipline. It’s destiny.

title: Masterpiece
overview: Two passionate lovers unite their artistic souls on a canvas, channeling their deepest emotions and shared experiences. As their painting evolves, it becomes a reflection of their connection and relationship.

title: I Want Your Sex
overview: When fresh-faced Elliot lands an exciting job for renowned artist, icon and provocateur Erika Tracy, his fantasies come true as Erika taps him to become her sexual muse. But Elliot soon finds himself out of his depth as Erika takes him on a journey more profound than he ever could have imagined, into a world of sex, obsession, power, betrayal and murder.

title: Marvelous Mornings
overview: At her grandmother's funeral, Charlie learns that she already has a place reserved in the family vault. In search of an escape, she herself delivers the crate of disco vinyls her grandmother left to the wine merchant in a village in the south of France. In the deserted seaside resort, the records bring back bitter memories of lost loves. Here, time has a different value, and people are more bored than busy. Charlie only has eyes for Marina, the waitress at the pizzeria. Nothing predestined clumsy, overly sincere Charlie and wounded tornado Marina to mend fences together. But sometimes destiny reunites lost mermaids.

title: За любовь
overview: A couple on the brink of divorce receives a magic bottle that grants wishes, turning their lives upside down.

title: The Elder Eagle
overview: The old man refuses to leave his native village, abandoned by other residents long time ago. To stand up to the local authorities, who have their own plans for the beautiful mountain land, he lures by deceit his son and grandchildren from Moscow – they must help him turn the village into an eco-touristic place. The family members get a chance to reconnect with their roots, see each other in a new light, and become a close, loving family.

title: Death Note - The Musical
overview: If you had the power over life and death, what would you do?  Now, boldly reimagined for the London stage in close collaboration with the original Japanese producers, HoriPro, this new musical features an electrifying score by Tony, Grammy and Emmy nominee Frank Wildhorn, lyrics by Jack Murphy and a book by Ivan Menchell. Death Note: The Musical is set to be the theatrical event of the summer.  When brilliant student Light Yagami discovers a notebook with the power to determine who lives and who dies, his mission to reshape society quickly spirals out of control and attracts the attention of the elusive and ruthless detective L. What begins as justice descends into obsession and forces both Light and L to confront the limits of morality itself.

title: Pentacide
overview: In 1999, a series of grisly, religiously inspired killings struck the country repeating every five years, now in the present day (2024) the story follows two detectives who are trying to solve the biggest serial killer case the UK has ever seen!

title: Ashes
overview: One night. One gun. Two estranged brothers reunited by the man who killed their parents and a choice that will either damn them both or lead one to grace.

title: Mother Mary
overview: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
overview: Four years have passed since the events of No Way Home, and Peter is now an adult living entirely alone, having voluntarily erased himself from the lives and memories of those he loves. Crime-fighting in a New York that no longer knows his name, he's devoted himself entirely to protecting his city — a full-time Spider-Man — but as the demands on him intensify, the pressure sparks a surprising physical evolution that threatens his existence, even as a strange new pattern of crimes gives rise to one of the most powerful threats he has ever faced.

title: Crayon Shin-chan the Movie: Very Bizarre! My Yokai Vacation
overview: Shin-chan and his family visit his father's home town of Akita in order to view the Omagari Fireworks Festival. When a strange incident to causes the residents of “Yokai Land” to begin running wild throughout Akita and the rest of Japan, Shin-chan and company are lured to “Yokai Land” for an unusual adventure.

title: A Corpse in Kensington
overview: A mysterious killing spree ignites suspicion among three former classmates who have rekindled a love triangle in their hometown on Halloween night.

title: Ip Man: Kung Fu Legend
overview: In 1950s Hong Kong, British merchants and Chinese triads have joined forces to expand their territory, forcibly demolishing factories without regard for public welfare. This move draws fierce opposition from Ip Man, standing up for the workers, he faces pressure from all sides. Framed for murder, he is sent to prison. Within the prison walls, the triads set multiple deadly traps. Can Ip Man overcome these trials, escape the danger, and clear his name?

title: Mala bestia
overview: An orphaned girl named Atenea lives in isolation with other children. When adopted by a family, she glimpses a chance at belonging, but her fear of losing this newfound home drives her to extreme measures.

title: Tokyo Nightfall
overview: A young man named Amenashi is haunted by the death of his younger sister Anna, who took her own life after witnessing a classmate’s suicide in high school. Burdened by guilt, he continues to chase her memory. One night, he learns of a secret mass suicide event held in a Tokyo nightclub and is drawn to it. His close friends, Nozu and Hattori, grow suspicious and follow him inside. In a closed-off space filled with despairing youths, the three attempt to escape, but are ultimately forced to confront the emotions they have each been carrying deep within.

title: Ish
overview: Twelve-year-old best friends, Ish and Maram wrestle to hold onto their friendship, in the wake of a traumatic police stop & search. As the ripples take hold, the boys try to make sense of the men they are becoming – and how ‘letting go’ can be the hardest part of growing up.

title: Super Duper
overview: On the night of a highly anticipated Super Duper Moon, two people embark on an intimate nighttime journey together. As clouds obscure the sky and the night stretches on, anticipation gives way to waiting, uncertainty, and presence. With the spectacle they planned for absent, the meaning of the evening must be negotiated through behavior, silence, and choice—revealing whether love is sustained by symbols or by staying.

title: KUMLAN
overview: The older brother and younger sister filming a documentary about the story of a man who recounts that after he drove through a forest at night, he began experiencing strange events that haunted him. He believes that something from that forest followed him back. The local legends about that forest provide clues that lead the siblings to encounter something that will haunt both of them for the rest of their lives as well.

title: One Guy, Too Many Dates
overview: After one too many disastrous dates, a talented software engineer creates a women-centered app where users can anonymously review their dating experiences. What begins as a simple idea quickly turns into a viral phenomenon, igniting chaos between men and women online, attracting media attention, and complicating Emily’s own love life. In a world where everyone has opinions about dating, Emily discovers that building an app about relationships might be easier than surviving one.

title: Consequence
overview: After risking a patients life while unfit to operate, a surgeon tackles his guilt as his daughter's wedding approaches.

title: Transylvania Tapes
overview: In 1997, Romanian actress Silvia Enescu mysteriously disappeared while searching for family property in Transylvania. All she left behind were a collection of home movies: the TRANSYLVANIA TAPES. Now, Silvia's daughter Mara travels from Los Angeles to Romania to discover what happened to her mother. With the help of her cameraman friend Dylan, Mara documents her journey, which takes her from the streets of Bucharest to the medieval town of Sighisoara, deep in the heart of Transylvania. Unearthing the truth about her mother comes at a terrible price, as Mara must escape an ancient family curse.

title: Kids' Festival! All the Heroes of Justice Appear
overview: Kids' Festival! All the Heroes of Justice Appear was a televised celebration of tokusatsu heroes in 1976.

title: Dead & Breakfast
overview: The story follows Danielle Stanbreaker, a paranormal consultant investigating a strange supernatural occurrence at a local Bed and Breakfast that ultimately ends up being real.

title: Bonecos de Estado em Golpes de Plástico
